title: Logistics Manager
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  1. Manage logistics service providers, including supplier due diligence, qualification assessment, credit management, and compliance reviews;
  2. Review logistics-related contracts, agreements, and cost structures to ensure compliance and commercial reasonableness, and provide constructive recommendations;
  3. Organize periodic inspections covering inventory stocktaking, logistics cost reconciliation, and documentation management to ensure accuracy and process compliance;
  4. Support business units by designing practical and cost-effective logistics solutions based on actual business needs and operational scenarios;
  5. Lead logistics team development, including internal policy formulation and communication, training and knowledge sharing for logistics officers, as well as organizing team-building activities to enhance cohesion and execution capability.

Qualifications:

  1. Bachelor’s degree or above (full-time), majoring in Shipping, Logistics Management, International Business, International Trade, or related disciplines;
  2. Minimum of 5 years’ experience in large-scale shipping or logistics companies; candidates familiar with port operations and customs clearance for bulk commodities are preferred;
  3. Solid knowledge of international logistics for bulk commodities such as chemicals and oil products, including vessel port entry/exit procedures and cargo customs clearance regulations;
  4. Outgoing personality with strong communication and coordination skills; able to work under pressure, diligent, detail-oriented, and highly responsible;
  5. Clear logical thinking with strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  6. Business-level proficiency and fluency in English and Mandarin, both written and verbal, with the ability to handle professional communication, contracts, and documentation related to international business operations

postedCompany.description:
Sino Crown International Pte. Ltd (the “ Company") is incorporated and domiciled in
Singaporewith its registered address and principal place of business at 10 Anson Road
#13-15International Plaza, Singapore 079903.
The principal activities of the Company are those relating to general wholesale trade of avariety
of goods without a dominant product and wholesale of metals and meta ores exceptgeneral
hardware.
The Company's immediate and ultimate holding company is Zheshang Development Group
Co.Ltd., which is incorporated in China.
Zheshang Development (stock code: 000906), as a state-owned listed company under Zhejiang
Provincial Transportation Group, a Fortune 500 company, was established in April 1999. In June
2008, the controlling shareholder of the company changed to Zhejiang Materials International
and officially entered the Zhejiang Provincial State owned Assets Management System; In January
2016, Zhejiang Provincial Transportation Group became the controlling shareholder of the
company; In August 2018, the registered address of the company officially moved from Changsha,
Hunan to Hangzhou, Zhejiang. By 2023, the operating revenue will reach 203.065 billion yuan, a
year-on-year increase of 4.89%; The total profit is 1.514 billion yuan; The net profit attributable
to shareholders of the listed company is 711 million yuan.
postedCompany.name: SINO CROWN INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
